title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at VMware India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at VMware India
jsonLd.description:
VMware India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Jabalpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About VMware India:
VMware India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with VMware India!
